package rulecoverage

func NegativeBackgroundGoroutineStartedInsideTransactionScope() string {
    ruleID := "background_goroutine_started_inside_transaction_scope"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Goroutines launched while relying on open transaction state."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
